name: SIMD
description: SIMD is building a distributed compute platform for engineering simulations (CFD and thermal/cryogenic physics). Customers submit a simulation job and pay in USD, while the network settles and rewards in the SIMD token. Jobs are converted into SIMD once at the start and escrowed, then released as work progresses. GPU/CPU operators provide compute and are paid based on verified compute-hours, with bonding and slashing to enforce reliability. The goal is to make simulation “pay-as-you-go” and easier to run.
